---
title: "Hill 模型拟合"
---

## 加载数据

```{r}
#| label: load-data
library(tidyverse)
library(minpack.lm)
library(broom)
library(knitr)

# 加载清洗后的数据
selmetals <- readRDS("output/selmetals.rds")
listfitLang <- readRDS("output/listfitLang.rds")
cat("加载数据完成\n")
```

## 模型定义

Hill 吸附等温线模型：

$$Q_e = \frac{a \cdot C_e^b}{c^b + C_e^b}$$

其中：
- $Q_e$：平衡吸附量 (mg/g)
- $C_e$：平衡浓度 (mg/L)
- $a$：最大吸附量 (Qmax)
- $b$：Hill 系数（协同性指标）
- $c$：半饱和浓度

```{r}
#| label: hill-func
myFuncHill <- function(Ce_mg_l, a, b, c) {
  (a * Ce_mg_l^b) / (c^b + Ce_mg_l^b)
}

myFitHill <- function(df, a, b, c) {
  tryCatch(
    nls(Qe_mg_g ~ myFuncHill(Ce_mg_l, a, b, c),
        start = list(a = a, b = b, c = c),
        data = df),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}
```

## 批量拟合

```{r}
#| label: fit-hill
# 准备数据
selmetals$Biochar.Metal <- interaction(selmetals$Biochar, selmetals$Metal)
listmetals <- split(selmetals, selmetals$Biochar.Metal)
all_names <- names(listmetals)

# 根据重金属类型分别设定起始值
fitHill <- list()
for (nm in all_names) {
  if (grepl("Cd", nm)) {
    fit <- myFitHill(listmetals[[nm]], a=20, b=4, c=0.8)
  } else if (grepl("Pb", nm)) {
    fit <- myFitHill(listmetals[[nm]], a=45, b=9, c=0.1)
  } else if (grepl("Zn", nm)) {
    fit <- myFitHill(listmetals[[nm]], a=8, b=8, c=0.05)
  } else {
    fit <- NULL
  }
  fitHill[[nm]] <- fit
}

# 移除拟合失败的组合
fitHill <- fitHill[!sapply(fitHill, is.null)]
cat("成功拟合的 Hill 模型数量：", length(fitHill), "\n")
```

## 提取参数

```{r}
#| label: extract-params
extract_hill_params <- function(fit, model_name) {
  if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)
  tidy_fit <- tidy(fit)
  aic_val <- AIC(fit)
  tidy_fit <- tidy_fit %>%
    mutate(model = model_name,
           AIC = aic_val)
  return(tidy_fit)
}

paramsHill <- bind_rows(lapply(names(fitHill), function(nm) {
  extract_hill_params(fitHill[[nm]], nm)
}))

kable(paramsHill, caption = "Hill 模型拟合参数")
```

## 模型比较（AIC）

```{r}
#| label: aic-comparison
common_names <- intersect(names(fitHill), names(listfitLang))
aic_compare <- data.frame(
  Biochar.Metal = common_names,
  AIC_Langmuir = sapply(listfitLang[common_names], AIC),
  AIC_Hill     = sapply(fitHill[common_names], AIC)
) %>%
  mutate(Delta_AIC = AIC_Hill - AIC_Langmuir,
         Better = ifelse(Delta_AIC < 0, "Hill", "Langmuir"))

kable(aic_compare, caption = "Langmuir vs Hill 模型 AIC 比较")
```

## 拟合曲线

```{r}
#| label: fig-hill-curves
#| fig-cap: "Hill 模型拟合曲线（全范围）"
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
newdata <- data.frame(Ce_mg_l = c(seq(0, 1.9, 0.02), seq(2, 30, 1)))
predHill <- lapply(fitHill, function(fit) {
  if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)
  data.frame(Ce_mg_l = newdata,
             fitQe = predict(fit, newdata))
})
predHill_df <- bind_rows(predHill, .id = "Biochar.Metal")

metadata_hill <- data.frame(Biochar.Metal = names(fitHill)) %>%
  mutate(
    Biochar = str_split_fixed(Biochar.Metal, "\\.", 2)[,1],
    Metal   = str_split_fixed(Biochar.Metal, "\\.", 2)[,2]
  )
predHill_df <- left_join(predHill_df, metadata_hill, by = "Biochar.Metal")

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = selmetals, aes(x = Ce_mg_l, y = Qe_mg_g, color = Metal)) +
  geom_line(data = predHill_df, aes(x = Ce_mg_l, y = fitQe, group = Biochar.Metal)) +
  facet_grid(Metal ~ Biochar, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hill 模型拟合曲线",
       x = bquote('Ce ('*mg.L^-1*')'),
       y = bquote('Qe ('*mg.g^-1*')'))
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-hill-curves-low
#| fig-cap: "Hill 模型拟合曲线（低浓度区域放大）"
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = selmetals, aes(x = Ce_mg_l, y = Qe_mg_g, color = Metal)) +
  geom_line(data = predHill_df, aes(x = Ce_mg_l, y = fitQe, group = Biochar.Metal)) +
  facet_grid(Metal ~ Biochar, scales = "free") +
  xlim(c(0, 2)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hill 模型拟合（低浓度区域放大）",
       x = bquote('Ce ('*mg.L^-1*')'),
       y = bquote('Qe ('*mg.g^-1*')'))
```

## 残差诊断

```{r}
#| label: fig-hill-residuals
#| fig-cap: "Hill 模型残差图"
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8
resid_list_hill <- lapply(fitHill, function(fit) {
  if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)
  data.frame(
    fitted = fitted(fit),
    residuals = residuals(fit)
  )
})
resid_df_hill <- bind_rows(resid_list_hill, .id = "Biochar.Metal")

ggplot(resid_df_hill, aes(x = fitted, y = residuals)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  facet_wrap(~ Biochar.Metal, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hill 模型残差", x = "拟合值", y = "残差")
```

## 保存结果

```{r}
#| label: save-results
# 保存 Hill 模型结果供后续章节使用
saveRDS(paramsHill, "output/paramsHill.rds")
saveRDS(predHill_df, "output/predHill_df.rds")
cat("Hill 模型结果已保存\n")
```
